The inﬂuence technique
requires the the inversion of a Hessian matrix that has a size that is quadratic in the number of model

5
Applications
We apply TracIn to a regression problem (Section 5.1) a text problem (Section 5.2) and an computer
vision problem (Section 5.3) to demonstrate its ability to generate insights.
